MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-02-2013 IN 206, PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S APPLICATION TO APPOINT GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR DEFENDANT MIRIAM GOLDSTEIN. JERRY THREET APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT VACATED ITS PREVIOUS ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM TO REPRESENT DEFENDANT MIRIAM GOLDSTEIN ON 4/25/13. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
